title: UI Kit Component Index
description: Master catalog of all documented UI components with quick reference and usage examples

overview.purpose: Complete UI kit documentation for recreating components in new Figma files without access to original design system

colors.description: Complete brand color palette with hex values
colors.usage: Reference by 'ref' property (e.g., 'brandAccentPrimary') or direct hex value

typography.description: Complete type system with font families, sizes, weights, and line heights
typography.usage: Reference by style name (e.g., 'h1', 'button') or direct fontSize/fontWeight values

spacing.description: Spacing scale based on 16px base unit (8pt grid system)
spacing.usage: Use spacing tokens for padding, margins, gaps. Always align to 8pt grid.

icons.description: Complete icon library with 150+ vector icons
icons.usage: Reference by category and icon name

styles.description: Visual effects: shadows, corner radius, borders, opacity
styles.usage: Apply consistent depth and styling across components

brandingAndGrids.description: Brand assets (logos) and layout grid systems
brandingAndGrids.usage: Logo variations for different contexts, responsive grid layouts

buttons.description: Complete button system with 3 types and 6 sizes
buttons.recreation: create_frame + set_fills + set_corner_radius + create_text (for primary) OR add set_stroke (for secondary) OR text only (for ghost)

forms.description: Complete form component system including inputs, checkboxes, radios, pills, selectors

input.usage: Text input fields with labels and validation

formPatterns.standardForm: Title → Description → Input fields (24px spacing) → Buttons (Primary + Secondary, 16px spacing)
formPatterns.inlineForm: Horizontal layout with 16px spacing between fields

forms.recreation: Input: create_frame (vertical, 320px) + create_text (label) + create_frame (field) + create_text (input) + create_text (help)

accordions.usage: FAQs, settings groups, filters, documentation sections

switches.description: Toggle switches for binary on/off states

tags.description: Labels and badges for status and categories
tags.usage: Game thumbnails, status indicators, promotional badges

headers.description: Navigation headers for different page contexts
headers.usage: Primary navigation, page titles, modal headers, live sections

topBanners.usage: Welcome bonuses, maintenance notices, live events

cards.description: Card components for various content types

paymentCard.structure: Radio + Logo + Info (card number, expiry) + Actions (edit, delete)

coinPack.structure: Background gradient + Coin amount + Divider + Offer title + Icon + Button

cards.recreation: create_frame + set_corner_radius + set_image_fill + apply_effects (shadow) + add content

modals.description: Modal/popup components for overlays and dialogs

marketingPopup.structure: Header (hero image + close) → Body (title + description) → Footer (CTA buttons)

footer.description: Site footer with links and newsletter
footer.usage: Page footer with legal, links, social

specializedFlows.note: These build on base components (buttons, forms, cards) customized for specific contexts

example1_primaryButton.description: Create a primary CTA button (medium size)
steps: 1. Reference buttons.json → variants.primary.sizes.MD
2. Create frame: layoutMode=HORIZONTAL, padding(h=20, v=10), itemSpacing=8
3. Set fill: brandAccentPrimary (#25ECFF) from colors.json
4. Set cornerRadius: 8
5. Add text: 'BUTTON', fontSize=14 (fontMD from typography.json), fontWeight=500, color=base0 (#1D092F)
6. Set textCase: UPPER
7. Result: 120x50px button with cyan background and dark text

example2_modalWithForm.description: Create a modal with a login form (2 inputs + 1 checkbox + 2 buttons)
steps: 1. Create overlay: full viewport, fill=base0 (#1D092F, opacity=0.6)
2. Create modal frame: width=400, layoutMode=VERTICAL, cornerRadius=16, background=base100 (#FFFFFF), shadow=elevation-4
3. CREATE HEADER: padding=24, borderBottom=1px base90
- Add title: 'Login', fontSize=20, fontWeight=700
- Add close button: 24x24 icon
4. CREATE BODY: padding=24, itemSpacing=24
- Add email input: Use input structure from forms.json, width=352 (400-48 for padding)
* Label: 'Email', fontSize=12
* Field: height=48, placeholder='Enter your email'
- Add password input: Same structure, placeholder='Enter your password'
- Add checkbox: 20x20, label='Remember me'
5. CREATE FOOTER: padding=24, borderTop=1px base90
- Add actions frame: layoutMode=HORIZONTAL, itemSpacing=16, justifyContent=flex-end
- Add secondary button: 'Cancel', size=MD from buttons.json
- Add primary button: 'Login', size=MD from buttons.json
6. Center modal in viewport
7. Result: Complete login modal with form validation states

example3_cardWithSelection.description: Create a payment method card (default state)
steps: 1. Reference cards.json → components.paymentCard.default
2. Create frame: layoutMode=HORIZONTAL, width=370, height=66, padding(h=16, v=12), itemSpacing=12
3. Set background: base100 (#FFFFFF), cornerRadius=8, border(base70 #CEB6D8, 1px)
4. Add radio button: 20x20, unselected state from forms.json
5. Add card logo: 40x24 image (Mastercard/Visa)
6. Add info frame: layoutMode=VERTICAL, itemSpacing=4
- Card number: '**** 1234', fontSize=14, fontWeight=500
- Expiry: 'Exp: 12/25', fontSize=12, color=base40
7. Add actions frame: layoutMode=HORIZONTAL, itemSpacing=8
- Edit button: 32x32 icon
- Delete button: 32x32 trash icon
8. Result: Payment card ready for selection

example4_formWithValidation.description: Create an input field with error state
steps: 1. Reference forms.json → components.input.error.filled
2. Create root frame: layoutMode=VERTICAL, itemSpacing=4, width=320
3. Add top label: 'Email address', fontSize=12, color=base60 (#A88FB6)
4. Add field frame: layoutMode=HORIZONTAL, itemSpacing=8, height=48
- Set border: systemError (#DD1717), width=2
- Add icon (optional): 16x16 leading icon
- Add input text: 'invalid@email', fontSize=16, color=base0
- Add error icon: 16x16 trailing icon
5. Add bottom help text: 'Please enter a valid email address', fontSize=12, color=systemError (#DD1717)
6. Result: Input field showing validation error

example5_coinPackCard.description: Create a promotional coin pack card
steps: 1. Reference cards.json → components.coinPack.firstPurchase
2. Create frame: width=176, height=264, layoutMode=VERTICAL, cornerRadius=12
3. Add gradient background: LINEAR gradient gold to orange (#FFD700 → #FFA500)
4. Add coin amount: '50,000 GOLD COINS', fontSize=16, fontWeight=700, UPPER, center-aligned
5. Add divider line: stroke=base70, width=1
6. Add offer title: 'MEGA 1ST PURCHASE OFFER', fontSize=12, fontWeight=700, UPPER
7. Add coin icon: 60x60 image
8. Add discount button: width=144, height=40 from buttons.json
9. Apply shadow: y=4, blur=16, opacity=0.2
10. Result: Eye-catching promotional card

recreationWorkflow.description: Recommended workflow for recreating UI from this documentation
steps: 1. IDENTIFY COMPONENTS: Break down desired UI into components (button, input, modal, card, etc.)
2. REFERENCE FOUNDATIONS: Check colors.json, typography.json, spacing.json for values
3. FIND COMPONENT SPECS: Look up component in appropriate .json file (buttons, forms, cards, modals)
4. FOLLOW STRUCTURE: Use the 'structure' section to understand component hierarchy
5. APPLY STYLING: Use the 'styling' section for colors, borders, shadows, etc.
6. USE RECREATION GUIDE: Follow step-by-step instructions in 'recreationGuide' section
7. REFERENCE EXAMPLES: Check usageExamples in this index for complete workflows
8. TEST STATES: For interactive components, test all states (default, hover, focus, error, etc.)
tips: - Always start with foundations (colors, typography, spacing)
- Use exact hex values from colors.json, not token references
- Follow 8pt grid for all spacing (use spacing.json values)
- Check component states (hover, focus, error) for interactive elements
- Combine components: modals contain forms, forms contain inputs and buttons
- Apply shadows (elevation) for depth and hierarchy
- Test accessibility with WCAG contrast ratios for text

modalWithForm.description: Modal containing a form with multiple inputs and action buttons

cardWithButton.description: Card with embedded CTA button (e.g., coin pack with purchase button)

formWithValidation.description: Form with multiple input types and error states

selectionList.description: List of selectable cards (e.g., payment methods)

foundations/.typography.json: Font families, sizes, weights, line heights, text styles
foundations/.styles.json: Visual effects (shadows, corner radius, borders, opacity)
foundations/.branding-grids.json: Brand assets (logos) and responsive grid systems

components/.forms.json: 5 form component types with validation states
components/.cards.json: 4 card types (thumbnail, payment, coin pack, provider)

templates/.specialized-components.json: Complex templates (burger menu, footer, specialized flows)

fileStructure.index.json: This file - master catalog and quick reference

_metadata.methodology: Manual extraction using text-to-figma MCP tools
_metadata.status: PRODUCTION READY - Complete UI kit documentation
pagesDocumented: ✅ Foundations (7): Colors, Typography, Spacing, Icons, Styles, Branding, Spacing & Grids
✅ Molecules (6): Buttons, Forms, Accordions, Dropdowns, Switches, Tags
✅ Organisms (4): Headers, Menus, Banners, Cards, Modals
✅ Templates (11+): Burger Menu, Footer, iOS/Android, Specialized flows (Redemption, Purchase, Loyalty, etc.)
_metadata.usage: Start with this index for component discovery, then reference specific .json files for detailed specs and recreation guides. All components include exact hex colors (not tokens), complete dimensions, and step-by-step recreation instructions.
